name: interview-thalamus-sweep
description: Standalone extraction of Thalamus (multi-cortex research agent) and Sweep (nano swarm DB audit) for technical interview

scripts.arch:check: bash scripts/check-repository-import-leaks.sh && pnpm exec depcruise --config .dependency-cruiser.js apps/console-api/src --output-type err-long
scripts.arch:check:repo: pnpm exec depcruise --config .dependency-cruiser.js apps packages --output-type err-long && bash scripts/arch-check-thalamus-agnostic.sh
scripts.quality:gate: pnpm typecheck && pnpm typecheck:strict && pnpm arch:check:repo && pnpm dup:check && pnpm test:policy && pnpm spec:check && pnpm test
scripts.dup:report: pnpm exec jscpd --config .jscpd.json apps packages scripts
scripts.dup:check: pnpm exec jscpd --config .jscpd.json --threshold 3 --reporters console --silent apps packages scripts
scripts.dup:report:full: pnpm exec jscpd --gitignore --min-lines 10 --min-tokens 80 --mode strict --reporters console,json,html --output .reports/jscpd-full apps packages scripts
scripts.hooks:install: git config core.hooksPath .githooks && echo '  ✓ git hooks installed (.githooks/)'
scripts.prepare: git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1 && git config core.hooksPath .githooks || echo '  (skipped hooks install — not a git repo yet)'
